name: Bhai Kartar Singh (Nankana Sahib)
body: Bhai Kartar Singh Ji used to serve as Hazoori Raagi in Gurdwara Janam Asthan Guru Nanak Dev Ji in Nankana Sahib before the division of Punjab. Following the partition, the family moved to Ludhiana and continued to perform Kirtan. Currently his sons, Bhai Jodhbir Singh and Bhai Mukhtiar Singh continue the family tradition and perform beautiful Kirtan. If anyone has more recordings of Bhai Kartar Singh Ji to share, please contact us.
